Mock India market assessment uses seeded price points normalized to 2025 INR.
Route family `liquid_hydration_train` drives rough utility/CAPEX screening.
Heat-integration ranking uses annual savings minus annualized CAPEX and fixed operability/safety penalties.
context: Final route and process architecture selection

criteria.name: Economic margin
criteria.justification: Selected route must preserve gross margin after heat-integration choice.

criteria.name: Utility intensity
criteria.justification: Residual purchased utility is critical in India-mode economics.

criteria.name: CAPEX intensity
criteria.justification: Route and recovery case should avoid excessive capital burden.

criteria.name: Industrial maturity
criteria.justification: Proven industrial precedent reduces decision risk.

criteria.name: Selectivity
criteria.justification: Higher MEG selectivity reduces downstream purification burden.

criteria.name: India fit
criteria.justification: Feedstock, cluster fit, and byproduct handling must align with India deployment.

assumptions: Mock India market assessment uses seeded price points normalized to 2025 INR.
Route family `chlorinated_hydrolysis_train` drives rough utility/CAPEX screening.
Mock India market assessment uses seeded price points normalized to 2025 INR.
Route family `chlorinated_hydrolysis_train` drives rough utility/CAPEX screening.
Heat-integration ranking uses annual savings minus annualized CAPEX and fixed operability/safety penalties.
Route family `chlorinated_hydrolysis_train` feeds final route ranking.
alternatives.description: Ethylene chlorohydrin hydrolysis (Chlorinated Hydrolysis Train) with No recovery

outputs.separation_train: Salt removal -> brine handling -> water removal -> purification

rejected_reasons: Route generates chloride-heavy waste and is not preferred for India deployment under the current policy basis.

selected_summary: OMEGA catalytic route via ethylene carbonate is selected within the `Liquid Hydration Train` family because it combines the strongest margin, residual utility burden, maturity, and India deployment fit under the selected recovery architecture.
hard_constraint_results: chlorohydrin: Route generates chloride-heavy waste and is not preferred for India deployment under the current policy basis.
